name: Cailabs Factmata
description: Factmata (now Cailabs) — content classification API for hate, toxicity, and misinformation in text.

seo.title: Cailabs Factmata — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Cailabs Factmata: Factmata (now Cailabs) — content classification API for hate, toxicity, and misinformation in text.

when_to_use: Detecting misinformation and brand safety risks in content feeds
Scoring content credibility before programmatic ad placement
Monitoring news and social content for brand-unsafe narratives
Integrating content risk scoring into content distribution pipelines

pros: Specialized in misinformation and hate classification
Decent accuracy for political and narrative content
cons: Rebrand to Cailabs muddies product clarity
Less transparent model cards than Perspective
review.verdict: Narrow-but-good text classifier for misinformation; shop around before committing given rebrand churn.
review.best_for: News platforms and research orgs classifying hate, toxicity, and disinformation in text.
review.not_for: Teams needing multimodal moderation or enterprise-grade support guarantees.
